place: Plai Laem, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside 4-Bedroom Villa with 18 m Infinity Pool & Sea Views - Plai Laem
note: Fully staffed · daily maid & breakfast · chef on request · price on request
blurb: A four-bedroom villa set high on the Plai Laem hillside at the quiet north-east tip of Koh Samui, where the island falls away below and the Gulf of Thailand opens across the horizon. An 18 m infinity pool runs to the edge of the terrace, and a soaring teak-beamed living pavilion opens through walls of sliding glass to the view. Four sea-facing en-suite bedrooms, open-plan living and dining, and interiors layered with antique and Asian-inspired pieces — fully staffed, with the beaches of Choeng Mon and Bo Phut a few minutes below.
detail:
This four-bedroom villa sits high on the hillside at Plai Laem, on the calm north-east corner of Koh Samui, where the land drops away into jungle and the Gulf of Thailand fills the outlook. The setting is elevated and green, with sea and mountain vistas on one side and forested slopes wrapping the rest for privacy, and the light lasts long into the evening at this height.

The heart of the house is a living pavilion crowned by six-metre teak-beamed ceilings, where walls of floor-to-ceiling sliding glass draw back to fold the terrace, pool and view into one open space. Living, kitchen and dining share a single relaxed volume, finished in dark stone and warm timber and layered throughout with antique furnishings and one-off Asian-inspired pieces.

An 18 m infinity pool stretches along the terrace with a submerged bench for sitting half in the water as the island spreads out below. Around it, shaded loungers, daybeds and several terrace seating areas make room for long afternoons, with both indoor and outdoor dining set up for easy evenings.

All four en-suite bedrooms look out to the sea. The master suite is arranged around a two-metre bed and a walk-in wardrobe, with an en-suite finished in geometric stone tile; the further three rooms each open to the view and carry their own rain-shower bathrooms with twin sinks. Every room is styled with the same restrained, collected hand as the living spaces.

The villa comes fully staffed. A resident maid keeps the house daily and prepares a continental breakfast, with a personal chef available on request for lunches and dinners. Choeng Mon and Bo Phut beaches are a five-minute drive down the hill, with Fisherman's Village, the Big Buddha temple and Samui Airport all close by.

features.l: 18 m infinity pool with submerged seating
Sea views from all four bedrooms
Walls of sliding glass to the terrace
Daily maid, breakfast & chef on request
5 minutes to Choeng Mon & Bo Phut beaches
